dropzone: Drag files or click here to upload them as reference
beta_texto: Only plain text files are processed (.txt, .md, .csv, .json). Activate the Lightning icon on each file to include it as a Knowledge Base for the AI. Support for PDF, eBooks and other formats will be added in future updates.
tokens_texto: If you upload and activate very long text files (e.g., a 10,000-word lore document), all that content will be sent in every AI request, consuming significant tokens. Use it with moderation.
vista_previa_no_disponible: Preview not available for this file type.
stopwords_modal_texto: Filtered words (stopwords) are common terms that the Oracle ignores during analysis to focus on relevant elements of your story. Add or remove terms as needed.
